scripts.build: compact-builder --hierarchical --out dist --clean-dist --exclude '*/archive/*' --exclude 'Mock*' --exclude '*.mock.compact' --copy package.json --copy ../README.md && find dist -type d -empty -delete
scripts.test: SKIP_ZK=true yarn run compact && vitest run
scripts.test:coverage: SKIP_ZK=true yarn run compact && vitest run --coverage
scripts.compact:integration: SKIP_ZK=true compact compile test/integration/_mocks/SharedInitCollision.compact artifacts/SharedInitCollision && SKIP_ZK=true compact compile test/integration/_mocks/ComposedTokens.compact artifacts/ComposedTokens
scripts.test:integration: yarn run compact:integration && vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts
